scripts.db:push: pnpm --filter api exec -- npx prisma db push
scripts.db:generate: pnpm --filter api exec -- npx prisma generate
scripts.db:studio: pnpm --filter api exec -- npx prisma studio
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec -- npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.seed: pnpm --filter api exec -- npx ts-node --transpile-only --compiler-options "{\"module\":\"CommonJS\"}" prisma/seed.ts
